summary: Novel `users bookmarks find` command: offline keyword/author search over synced bookmarks.
reason: X has no bookmark search and its API exposes no bookmark timestamp; the local store turns the bookmark graveyard into a searchable, agent-driveable working set. Reads the typed bookmarks table directly (not reimplementation).
validated_outcome: Unit tests + live: keyword, --from @handle (resolved via users table), keyword+author, empty-store.
